commands.review_summary:
The PR changes plugin tool construction to derive the one-shot `runtimeConfig` from config-only runtime snapshot helpers while preserving the live runtime-config getter, and adds a changelog fix entry.

Reproducibility: yes. for the source-level regression: current main calls `getActiveSecretsRuntimeSnapshot()` during plugin tool construction, and that getter clones the active secrets snapshot. I did not remeasure the reported 8.3s live latency in this read-only pass.
commands.review_followup: No automated repair is needed because the latest PR has no discrete blocking review finding; maintainer validation should focus on tests and timing proof before merge.

target.title: fix(agents/tools): cache getActiveSecretsRuntimeSnapshot() to eliminate ~8s core-plugin-tools latency
